guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 52. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_pr: Point to the big PR and say: prprpr. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_sl: Now point to the big SL and say: slslsl.

parent_story: A prince got a big present. A slide stood next to the prince.
